nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Aguillon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Francisco, Jesus, Pablo, Juan, Agustin, Carlos, Ernesto, Manuel, Roberto, Ruben, Santiago.
habitational name from any of several places called Aguillón in Spain (Asturias or Galicia), or Aguillon in Var, France.

en.lifeSummary: Manasser De Aguillon was born from 1078 to 1094, in Westbourne, Sussex, England, United Kingdom. He had at least 1 son with Eleanor de Marmion. He died in Nutbourne, West Sussex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Manasser De Aguillon est né du 1078 au 1094, à Westbourne, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Eleanor de Marmion. Il est décédé à Nutbourne, West Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Manasser De Aguillon wurde von 1078 bis 1094 in Westbourne, Sussex, England, United Kingdom geboren. Er hatte mit Eleanor de Marmion mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb in Nutbourne, West Sussex, England, United Kingdom.

ja.Nutbourne, West Sussex, England, United: イギリスイギリスウエスト スセックスヌトボウルン
ja.lifeSummary: Manasser De Aguillonはから1078年まで1094年にイギリスイギリススセックスウエストボウルンで生まれた。彼はEleanor de Marmionとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼はイギリスイギリスウエスト スセックスヌトボウルンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Manasser De Aguillon(은)는 1078년 부터 1094년 까지 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 웨스트보우른에서 태어났다. 그는 Eleanor de Marmion(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트 수세스 누트보우른에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Manasser De Aguillon родился с 1078 по 1094 в местности вестбурн, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Eleanor de Marmion. Он умер в местности нутбурн, вест суссекс, Англия, Великобритания.
